name: pm-groundwork
description: A PM starter kit for AI coding tools — Claude Code native .claude/ support, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini CLI via MCP. Interactive setup interview, persistent agent memory, structured decision logging, isolated pm-draft skill, and optional GSD framework integration.

commands.name: pm-setup
commands.description: Bootstrap a new PM project workspace with an interactive interview. Asks about project scope (docs only, docs + prototype, or full build) and tailors questions, files, GSD integration, and MEMORY.md sections accordingly.

commands.name: pm-start-session
commands.description: Start-of-session project recap. Summarizes progress, surfaces what's next, flags risks and decisions due for review, and helps you choose what to work on.

commands.name: pm-end-session
commands.description: End-of-session wrap-up. Updates memory, logs decisions, syncs GSD state, and backs up to git if configured.

commands.name: pm-draft
commands.description: Draft PM documents — PRDs, charters, roadmaps, risk plans, status reports, and more. Reads workspace context, asks targeted questions, generates a personalized first draft.
